items.text: Effective May 15, the recycling bins near the library will be relocated to the back of the Student Union. All bins must be emptied by 4:00 PM on May 14. Contact Facilities Office for details.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what must happen by 4:00 PM on May 14?

options.A: To empty all recycling bins near the library
options.B: To relocate the recycling bins to the library
options.C: To contact the Facilities Office for bin keys
options.D: To move the bins to the Student Union entrance

questions.explanation: The notice says 'All bins must be emptied by 4:00 PM on May 14,' so emptying is required.

questions.stem: Where will the recycling bins be placed after May 15?

options.A: To empty all recycling bins near the library
options.B: To relocate the recycling bins to the library
options.C: To contact the Facilities Office for bin keys
options.D: To move the bins to the back of the Student Union

questions.explanation: The notice states the bins 'will be relocated to the back of the Student Union' effective May 15.

items.text: Dear Jamie, your shift as a campus tour guide volunteer is confirmed for this Saturday, April 12, from 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM. Please arrive at the Welcome Center by 9:45 AM and bring a $10 deposit for the guide materials. Thank you, Tour Office.

questions.stem: What does the email ask Jamie to do for the volunteer shift?

options.A: To bring a $10 deposit for the guide materials
options.B: To confirm the shift with the Tour Office
options.C: To arrive at the Welcome Center by 10:00 AM
options.D: To prepare a campus tour script in advance

questions.explanation: The email says 'bring a $10 deposit for the guide materials,' so a deposit is required.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the campus tour guide shift?

options.A: To bring a $10 deposit for the guide materials
options.B: To confirm the shift with the Tour Office
options.C: To arrive at the Welcome Center by 10:00 AM
options.D: To arrive 15 minutes before the shift starts

questions.explanation: The email requests arrival by 9:45 AM for a shift starting at 10:00 AM, so arriving 15 minutes early is inferred.
